text: @georgediano Please research properly on literacy levels in Kenya. Bukusus are among the most educated in Kenya. The man you are belittling (Didmus) is one of the best performing MPs in Kenya and has completed his PhD studies, awaiting graduation. Bukusus do not beat kikuyus in alcoholism.
